nasb.text: Every man who has something on his head while praying or prophesying disgraces his head.

esv.text: Every man who prays or prophesies with his head covered dishonors his head,

cnv.text: 男人禱告或講道的時候，如果蒙著頭，就是羞辱自己的頭。

ccb.text: 男人在祷告和讲道时，若蒙着头，就是羞辱自己的头。

csbs.text: 凡是男人在祷告或做先知传道的时候，如果蒙着头，就是羞辱自己的头；
